description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a smooth, polished surface and a warm brown finish, likely made from solid wood or wood veneer. The desk stands on four slender, tapered legs, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic. On the front, there is a single drawer with a metallic handle on the right side and an open storage compartment on the left, providing both concealed and open storage options. The sides and back of the desk are plain, with no additional features or ornamentation. The wood grain is visible throughout, adding a natural texture and visual interest. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for both home and office environments.
description: A mid-century modern wooden desk with a single drawer, open compartment, and slender tapered legs, finished in a warm brown wood grain.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain, flat wooden panel and two visible legs, with no storage features visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the drawer with a metallic handle on the right and an open compartment on the left, as well as all four legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing a plain wooden panel and two legs.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a continuous wooden panel with no openings or features, and all four legs visible.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawer and open compartment is intended to face the user, serving as the functional front of the desk.
attribute_usage_context: writing desk or small computer workstation
